title: Energizing Rich Canadian Chickpeas Bao
description: A Canadian twist on a Korean classic, this dish features a rich and energizing filling made with chickpeas and served in a crispy ssam wrap.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the diced garlic and grated ginger and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the canned diced tomatoes, black pepper, and crushed red pepper flakes to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Drain and rinse the chickpeas, then add them to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese and sugar-free maple syrup until melted and smooth.
Warm the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the baos by spooning the chickpea filling onto the center of each wrap, then topping with sliced scallions.
Fold the bottom half of each wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wraps to form tight cylinders.
